action_sequence.expected_output: Reviewer can see both candidate points and the 804.672 m decision span against aerial and terrain derivatives.
action_sequence.title: Load candidate GeoJSON and the two downstream review windows.

action_sequence.expected_output: Exact geometry source, unresolved source disagreement, and unsupported access claims are recorded separately.
action_sequence.title: Check official access/source leads against the candidate points.

action_sequence.expected_output: Selected option id plus source-mile convention are recorded; selection remains invalid without exact geometry and reviewers.
action_sequence.title: Choose 20.5-mile, 21.0-mile, or replacement reviewed endpoint basis.

action_sequence.expected_output: A replacement or selected endpoint is explicit enough for final window crop, rapid restationing, and editor overlay regeneration.
required_inputs: accepted official layer, field point, survey, or guide-reviewed GIS point
action_sequence.title: Attach exact lon/lat, station_m, and geometry authority.

action_sequence.expected_output: Public route-detail screenshots are either approved, restricted, or blocked with a documented reason.
action_sequence.title: Decide what downstream access details may appear in public captures.

action_sequence.expected_output: Every required role has a dated result before any promotion flag can change.
action_sequence.title: Capture reviewer identities, dates, evidence links, and decision comments.

action_sequence.expected_output: Final clipped corridor, all 20 rapid stations, editor markers, and solver windows are regenerated from the selected anchor.
action_sequence.title: Regenerate crop/station/editor artifacts only after approval is complete.

official_source_leads.provider: California Department of Parks and Recreation / Division of Boating and Waterways
used_for: Official public boating-access lead for Folsom Lake SRA Salmon Falls BTAF.
Confirms body-of-water context as American River-South Fork.
Confirms California State Parks jurisdiction/authority and El Dorado County context.

official_source_leads.provider: California Department of Parks and Recreation / Division of Boating and Waterways
used_for: Cross-check that Folsom Lake SRA Salmon Falls BTAF is in the official American River-South Fork boating-facility index.
Cross-check that the facility class is boating access and public access.
Compare downstream access with Gorge Run, Greenwood Creek, Henningsen-Lotus, Skunk Hollow, and Slab Creek entries during station review.

blocked_from: exact Salmon Falls Bridge landing coordinate
used_for: Official federal route-context lead for South Fork American public-land recreation.
Confirms BLM route context for a 21-mile South Fork run.
Confirms Salmon Falls Bridge appears as an official take-out option.

official_source_leads.provider: California Department of Parks and Recreation
used_for: Current Folsom Lake SRA operations and launch-status lead for reservoir-stage/access review.
Reminder that launch/access status can change and must be checked at review time.

required_artifacts.review_use: primary aerial/route overlay for candidate placement
terrain context for banks, road cuts, bridge approaches, and reservoir shoreline
source elevation derivative for later crop/terrain sanity checks
seam and source-window continuity check before final crop
primary aerial/route overlay for candidate placement
terrain context for banks, road cuts, bridge approaches, and reservoir shoreline
source elevation derivative for later crop/terrain sanity checks
seam and source-window continuity check before final crop

station_options.interpretation: Use the American Rivers 20.5-mile Salmon Falls Bridge/Folsom-area take-out basis as the downstream station convention.
station_options.review_consequence: Final crop would end at the upstream edge of the current anchor review window; the 21.0-mile over-cover would remain source context unless a reviewer selects it for access/stage reasons.

station_options.interpretation: Use the American Whitewater 21.0-mile full-run/Folsom basis as the downstream station convention.
station_options.review_consequence: Final crop would preserve the full 804.672 m downstream review window beyond the 20.5-mile candidate; access, reservoir stage, and publication-sensitivity review must justify the extra context.

complete_when: selected_option_id is one of the packet options or replacement_endpoint_used is true
exact anchor lon/lat, CRS, station_m, source-mile convention, and geometry authority are recorded
geospatial, guide/oarsman, rights/publication, and owner acceptance reviews are approved with dates
reservoir-stage/access and public-screenshot policy are explicitly recorded
next_after_completion: Regenerate final downstream crop and station axis.
Re-station all 20 South Fork rapid markers without order interpolation.
Regenerate catalog/editor marker outputs and corridor regression tests.
Only then bind Meat Grinder and Troublemaker solver windows to production geometry.

required_review_roles.required_decision: Confirm exact riverbank endpoint geometry, source CRS, station_m, and final crop relative to the candidate points.
Confirm whether the selected endpoint matches runnable guide practice and whether reservoir level changes the take-out.
Approve what access geometry, maps, and screenshots can be published, withheld, or blurred.
Accept the source-mile convention and unblock corridor crop only after the other reviewer records are complete.

scope: Reviewer-facing action packet for choosing the exact downstream South Fork full-reach anchor, source-mile convention, final crop, and publication-sensitivity rule.
